message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 用户购买流程

actor "用户" as User
participant "appPurchase 点餐服务" as appPurchase
participant "ms-trade" as msTrade
participant "subscribe-service" as subscribeService
participant "cbs" as cbs
participant "payment-service" as paymentService
participant "cgw" as cgw
participant "payment" as payment
participant "upm" as upm
participant "public-service" as publicService
participant "product" as product
participant "subscribe" as subscribe
participant "charging" as charging
participant "order" as order
participant "proxy" as proxy
participant "campaign" as campaign

User -> appPurchase: appPurchase 点餐服务
activate appPurchase
appPurchase -> msTrade: purchaseObj 点餐服务
activate msTrade
msTrade -> subscribeService: purchaseObj 点餐服务
activate subscribeService

group 读取缓存
    subscribeService -> cbs: queryContinuousTokenMemCache 查询连续订阅token
    activate cbs
    cbs --> subscribeService: queryContinuousTokenMemCache 返回查询连续订阅token的响应
    deactivate cbs
    
    subscribeService -> cbs: updateContinuousTokenMemCache 保存连续订阅token
    activate cbs
    cbs --> subscribeService: updateContinuousTokenMemCache 返回保存连续订阅token的响应
    deactivate cbs
    
    subscribeService -> cbs: updateContinuousTokenMemCache 回滚保存连续订阅token的响应
    activate cbs
    cbs --> subscribeService: updateContinuousTokenMemCache 回滚保存连续订阅token的响应
    deactivate cbs
end

subscribeService -> paymentService: getPaymentAccountInfo 获取支付号
activate paymentService
paymentService -> cgw: getPaymentAccountInfo 获取支付号
activate cgw
cgw --> paymentService: getPaymentAccountInfo 返回获取支付号的响应
deactivate cgw
paymentService --> subscribeService: getPaymentAccountInfo 返回获取支付号的响应
deactivate paymentService

group 拉取账号信息
    subscribeService -> upm: getAccountInfo 查询账号的手机号
    activate upm
    upm --> subscribeService: getAccountInfo 返回查询账号的手机号响应
    deactivate upm
    
    subscribeService -> publicService: matchNumberSegment 查询手机号归属地
    activate publicService
    publicService --> subscribeService: matchNumberSegment 返回查询手机号归属地的响应
    deactivate publicService
    
    subscribeService -> paymentService: paymentAccountManagement 注册支付号
    activate paymentService
    paymentService -> cgw: getPaymentAccountInfo 获取支付号
    activate cgw
    cgw --> paymentService: getPaymentAccountInfo 返回获取支付号的响应
    deactivate cgw
    
    paymentService -> cgw: createPaymentAccount 创建支付号
    activate cgw
    cgw --> paymentService: createPaymentAccount 返回创建支付号的响应
    deactivate cgw
    
    paymentService --> subscribeService: paymentAccountManagement 返回注册支付号的响应
    deactivate paymentService
end

subscribeService -> upm: isUserWhitelist 查询用户是否在白名单内
activate upm
upm --> subscribeService: isUserWhitelist 返回查询用户是否在白名单内的响应
deactivate upm

group 用户是否已购买
    subscribeService -> product: purchaseObj 点餐服务-商品Id判断
    activate product
    product --> subscribeService: purchaseObj 点餐服务-商品Id判断
    deactivate product
    
    subscribeService -> upm: matchNumberSegment 查询手机号省份和城市id
    activate upm
    upm --> subscribeService: matchNumberSegment 返回查询手机号省份和城市id的响应
    deactivate upm
    
    subscribeService -> product: readItemQueryService.fetchItemInfo 查询产品信息
    activate product
    product --> subscribeService: readItemQueryService.fetchItemInfo 返回查询产品信息的响应
    deactivate product
end

group 订单数量是1和是否是首单或首次付款成功
    subscribeService -> subscribe: purchaseObj 点餐服务-商品ID>0判断
    activate subscribe
    subscribe --> subscribeService: purchaseObj 点餐服务-商品ID>0判断
    deactivate subscribe
end

group 续包判断
    subscribeService -> subscribe: fetchItemSubscriptions 查询已有订阅信息
    activate subscribe
    subscribe --> subscribeService: fetchItemSubscriptions 返回已有订阅信息
    deactivate subscribe
    
    alt 上一个套餐没有到期
        subscribeService -> subscribe: subscribe 更新已有订阅信息结束时间
        activate subscribe
        subscribe --> subscribeService: subscribe 返回响应
        deactivate subscribe
    end
    
    subscribeService -> subscribe: authenticate 判断是否可续包
    activate subscribe
    subscribe --> subscribeService: authenticate 返回是否续包
    deactivate subscribe
end

group 计算单价乘以1
    subscribeService -> charging: purchaseObj 点餐服务-商品ID>4900
    activate charging
    charging --> subscribeService: purchaseObj 点餐服务-商品ID>4900
    deactivate charging
    
    subscribeService -> charging: eventCalculatorService.calculatePrice 按照市场价报价
    activate charging
    charging --> subscribeService: eventCalculatorService.calculatePrice 返回报价结果
    deactivate charging
end

group 选择并配置支付方式
    subscribeService -> payment: autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
    activate payment
    payment --> subscribeService: autoAdaptedPayChannels 返回适配支付方式的响应
    deactivate payment
    
    subscribeService -> payment: autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
    activate payment
    payment --> subscribeService: autoAdaptedPayChannels 返回适配支付方式的响应
    deactivate payment
    
    note right of subscribeService: 根据系统配置是否为支付宝或微信支付,如果是,则优先使用;如果不是,则默认使用Apple Pay,如果没有Apple Pay,则使用市场上能用的第一个支付方式
end

subscribeService -> order: createOrder 创建订单
activate order
order --> subscribeService: createOrder 返回创建订单的响应
deactivate order

group 计算乘以2
    subscribeService -> subscribe: authenticate 判断是否可续包
    activate subscribe
    subscribe --> subscribeService: authenticate 返回是否续包
    deactivate subscribe
end

group 计算单价乘以2
    subscribeService -> charging: purchaseObj 点餐服务-商品ID>4900
    activate charging
    charging --> subscribeService: purchaseObj 点餐服务-商品ID>4900
    deactivate charging
    
    subscribeService -> charging: eventCalculatorService.calculatePrice 按照市场价报价
    activate charging
    charging --> subscribeService: eventCalculatorService.calculatePrice 返回报价结果
    deactivate charging
end

group 选择并配置支付方式
    subscribeService -> payment: autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
    activate payment
    payment --> subscribeService: autoAdaptedPayChannels 返回适配支付方式的响应
    deactivate payment
    
    subscribeService -> payment: autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
    activate payment
    payment --> subscribeService: autoAdaptedPayChannels 返回适配支付方式的响应
    deactivate payment
    
    note right of subscribeService: 根据系统配置是否为支付宝或微信支付,如果是,则优先使用;如果不是,则默认使用Apple Pay,如果没有Apple Pay,则使用市场上能用的第一个支付方式
end

subscribeService -> order: createOrder 创建订单
activate order
order --> subscribeService: createOrder 返回创建订单的响应
deactivate order

subscribeService -> order: submitOrder 提交订单
activate order
order --> subscribeService: submitOrder 返回提交订单的响应
deactivate order

group 调用pay接口
    subscribeService -> order: payOrder 支付订单
    activate order
    order --> subscribeService: payOrder 返回支付订单的响应
    deactivate order
end

group 该方式未配置支付号
    subscribeService -> subscribe: batchSubscribe 批量订阅
    activate subscribe
    subscribe --> subscribeService: batchSubscribe 返回批量订阅的响应
    deactivate subscribe
    
    subscribeService -> payment: directPayment 代扣
    activate payment
    payment --> subscribeService: directPayment 返回代扣的响应
    deactivate payment
end

group 读取缓存
    subscribeService -> cbs: queryDailyDiscount 同步每日优惠(物品名和该章节对应的系列参数名称)
    activate cbs
    cbs --> subscribeService: queryDailyDiscount 返回同步每日优惠(物品名和该章节对应的系列参数名称)的响应
    deactivate cbs
    
    subscribeService -> cbs: queryDailyDiscount 返回同步每日优惠(物品名和该章节对应的系列参数名称)
    activate cbs
    cbs --> subscribeService: queryDailyDiscount 返回同步每日优惠(物品名和该章节对应的系列参数名称)的响应
    deactivate cbs
    
    subscribeService -> proxy: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main
    activate proxy
    proxy --> subscribeService: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main
    deactivate proxy
    
    group 定时触发
        subscribeService -> proxy: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main
        activate proxy
        proxy --> subscribeService: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main
        deactivate proxy
        
        subscribeService -> campaign: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main,刷新商品购买记录表：ord_2_itempurchase_order中的订单数,保持订单数直到后台订单商品仓库表：ord_2_item_repository中商品库存为0
        activate campaign
        campaign --> subscribeService: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main,刷新商品购买记录表：ord_2_itempurchase_order中的订单数,保持订单数直到后台订单商品仓库表：ord_2_item_repository中商品库存为0
        deactivate campaign
    end
end

group 请求超时
    subscribeService -> payment: directPayment 代扣
    activate payment
    payment --> subscribeService: directPayment 返回代扣的响应
    deactivate payment
    
    note right of subscribeService: 支付等待回调
end

subscribeService -> order: payOrder 返回支付订单的响应
activate order
order --> subscribeService: payOrder 返回支付订单的响应
deactivate order

group 请求失败或者等待回调直至订单完成或超时后继续,进入自动取消流程(见支付订单取消流程)
    subscribeService -> payment: notifyStatus 支付成功的异步回调结果
    activate payment
    payment --> subscribeService: notifyStatus 返回支付成功的异步回调结果的响应
    deactivate payment
    
    subscribeService -> subscribe: batchSubscribe 批量订阅
    activate subscribe
    subscribe --> subscribeService: batchSubscribe 返回批量订阅的响应
    deactivate subscribe
    
    group 读取缓存
        subscribeService -> cbs: queryDailyDiscount 同步每日优惠(物品名和该章节对应的系列参数名称)
        activate cbs
        cbs --> subscribeService: queryDailyDiscount 返回同步每日优惠(物品名和该章节对应的系列参数名称)的响应
        deactivate cbs
        
        subscribeService -> cbs: queryDailyDiscount 返回同步每日优惠(物品名和该章节对应的系列参数名称)
        activate cbs
        cbs --> subscribeService: queryDailyDiscount 返回同步每日优惠(物品名和该章节对应的系列参数名称)的响应
        deactivate cbs
        
        subscribeService -> proxy: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main
        activate proxy
        proxy --> subscribeService: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main
        deactivate proxy
        
        group 定时触发
            subscribeService -> proxy: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main
            activate proxy
            proxy --> subscribeService: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main
            deactivate proxy
            
            subscribeService -> campaign: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main,刷新商品购买记录表：ord_2_itempurchase_order中的订单数,保持订单数直到后台订单商品仓库表：ord_2_item_repository中商品库存为0
            activate campaign
            campaign --> subscribeService: 发送msg.topic=ItemPurch.tags=Main,刷新商品购买记录表：ord_2_itempurchase_order中的订单数,保持订单数直到后台订单商品仓库表：ord_2_item_repository中商品库存为0
            deactivate campaign
        end
    end
    
    subscribeService -> order: notifyStatus 返回支付成功的异步回调结果的响应
    activate order
    order --> subscribeService: notifyStatus 返回支付成功的异步回调结果的响应
    deactivate order
    
    subscribeService -> order: batchFetchHistoryOrders 查询历史订单
    activate order
    order --> subscribeService: batchFetchHistoryOrders 返回查询历史订单的响应
    deactivate order
    
    subscribeService -> order: batchFetchHistoryOrders 返回查询历史订单的响应
    activate order
    order --> subscribeService: batchFetchHistoryOrders 返回查询历史订单的响应
    deactivate order
end

group 判断是否有取消状态的历史订单或者新购买订单
    subscribeService -> order: purchaseObj 点餐服务-商品ID>4900
    activate order
    order --> subscribeService: purchaseObj 点餐服务-商品ID>4900
    deactivate order
end

group 订单是否过期
    subscribeService -> order: 设置订单的取消原因
    activate order
    order --> subscribeService: 设置订单的取消原因
    deactivate order
    
    alt 该用户重新访问时
        subscribeService -> order: 不显示有激活过的订单
        activate order
        order --> subscribeService: 不显示有激活过的订单
        deactivate order
    end
end

group 计算乘以3
    subscribeService -> order: 如果用户有激活过的记录，将会允许购买
    activate order
    order --> subscribeService: 如果用户有激活过的记录，将会允许购买
    deactivate order
end

group 尝试点击再购按钮，查看订购的套餐
    subscribeService -> campaign: setActivityInfo 设置活动信息为已激活
    activate campaign
    campaign --> subscribeService: setActivityInfo 返回设置活动信息为已激活的响应
    deactivate campaign
    
    subscribeService -> campaign: setActivityInfo 返回设置活动信息为已激活的响应
    activate campaign
    campaign --> subscribeService: setActivityInfo 返回设置活动信息为已激活的响应
    deactivate campaign
end

group 结算支付
    subscribeService -> charging: 查找当前套餐以判断该套餐的ChargingID(如果该套餐是周卡则以7天周期来执行WeekBilling逻辑)
    activate charging
    charging --> subscribeService: 查找当前套餐以判断该套餐的ChargingID(如果该套餐是周卡则以7天周期来执行WeekBilling逻辑)
    deactivate charging
    
    subscribeService -> charging: continuousBilling.runContinuousCharging 处理重支付
    activate charging
    charging --> subscribeService: continuousBilling.runContinuousCharging 返回处理重支付的响应
    deactivate charging
end

msTrade --> appPurchase: purchaseObj 返回点餐服务的响应
deactivate msTrade
appPurchase --> User: purchaseObj 返回点餐服务的响应
deactivate appPurchase
subscribeService --> msTrade: purchaseObj 点餐服务-返回
deactivate subscribeService

@enduml
```
